category_sources: Official GitHub README describes clinfo as enumerating OpenCL platform and device properties.
source_facts.description says it prints information about OpenCL platforms and devices.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is Oblomov/clinfo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has Usage and references the bundled man page; no separate docs site found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Oblomov/clinfo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists OpenCL, GPGPU, and hardware-information topics and describes diagnostic use cases.
source_facts.description mentions OpenCL platforms and devices.
